parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/125.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { title: $json.title, summary: $json.summary, canonical_url: $json.canonical_url, source_name: $json.source_name, source_url: $json.source_url, topic: $json.topic, published_at: $json.published_at, duplicate_fingerprint: $json.duplicate_fingerprint, processed: false, content: $json.content, trend_score: $json.trend_score, search_volume: $json.search_volume, trend_velocity: $json.trend_velocity, metadata: $json.metadata } }}
